title: phemeranthus humilis
intro: Phemeranthus humilis, also known as dwarf rock jasmine or five eyes, is a low-growing succulent plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phemeranthus humilis include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and support the immune system. Phemeranthus humilis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
